_note: Expand to 50+ with Vigen's full list. These are core citations for E-E-A-T.

flagship.author: Matthew Walker
flagship.title: Why We Sleep
flagship.changed: REM as the night therapist — strips emotional charge from memories while preserving content. Foundation for why recurring dreams exist and what their cessation means.

flagship.author: Rosalind Cartwright
flagship.title: The Twenty-Four Hour Mind
flagship.changed: Longitudinal dimension — dream content tracks life transitions. Undergirds everything about dream timing.

flagship.author: Antonio Damasio
flagship.title: The Feeling of What Happens
flagship.changed: Somatic markers — the body's emotional record is neurologically primary. Changed the 'body knows first' dimension of every reading.

flagship.author: Joseph LeDoux
flagship.title: The Emotional Brain
flagship.changed: Two-pathway model of fear — body responds before conscious appraisal. Foundation of 'body knows first.'

flagship.author: Robert Sapolsky
flagship.title: Behave
flagship.changed: Social and status threat processed like physical danger — basis for money dreams, being-watched dreams, professional-height dreams.

flagship.author: Bessel van der Kolk
flagship.title: The Body Keeps the Score
flagship.changed: Somatic dimension of trauma — recurring dreams and nightmares that return long after the original event.
